metadata.title: Quick Double Kill with Smart Positioning and Timing in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this fast double kill where smooth peeks and steady aim secure the round. Timing those angles just right made all the difference.
What’s your favorite spot to clutch in VALORANT? Share your thoughts below!

Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch
